Class Charger

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.GameObject
MyGame.GameObject.Enemies.Enemy
MyGame.GameObject.Enemies.Charger
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable
public class Charger extends Enemy
An enemy that aggressively charges towards the player to deal damage.
